skills.name: get_scene_summary
skills.description: Get PlayerStart location and all Demo_ actors in compact JSON format

skills.name: search_ue_assets
skills.description: Search UE asset registry for StaticMesh assets by keyword, returns full mesh paths for spawn_actor
skills.code:
import unreal, json
# Change KEYWORD to what you want to find: "container", "crane", "fence", "truck" etc.
KEYWORD = "container"
reg = unreal.AssetRegistryHelpers.get_asset_registry()
f = unreal.ARFilter(class_names=['StaticMesh'], recursive_paths=True, package_paths=['/Game'])
assets = reg.get_assets(f)
kw = KEYWORD.lower()
matched = [str(a.package_name) + '.' + str(a.asset_name)
           for a in assets
           if kw in str(a.asset_name).lower() or kw in str(a.package_name).lower()]
print(json.dumps({'keyword': KEYWORD, 'count': len(matched), 'assets': matched[:40]}))

skills.name: spawn_container_row
skills.description: Spawn a row of SM_Container12m containers along X axis with configurable count and spacing
skills.code:
import unreal, json, time
# CONFIG - adjust as needed
START_X = -3500; START_Y = -3800; Z = 0
COUNT = 3; SPACING = 1300  # SM_Container12m is ~1200 wide
YAW = 0    # 0=lengthwise, 90=crosswise (creates corridors)
PREFIX = "Demo_ContRow"
MESH = "/Game/ContainerYard/Meshes/SM_Container12m.SM_Container12m"
# SPAWN with unique names to avoid UE crash
subsys = unreal.get_editor_subsystem(unreal.EditorActorSubsystem)
mesh_obj = unreal.load_asset(MESH)
spawned = []
for i in range(COUNT):
    sfx = hex(int(time.time()*1000+i) % 0xFFFF)[2:].upper()
    name = f"{PREFIX}_{sfx}"
    loc = unreal.Vector(START_X + i * SPACING, START_Y, Z)
    actor = subsys.spawn_actor_from_class(unreal.StaticMeshActor, loc)
    if actor and mesh_obj:
        actor.set_actor_label(name)
        comp = actor.get_component_by_class(unreal.StaticMeshComponent)
        if comp: comp.set_static_mesh(mesh_obj)
        actor.set_actor_rotation(unreal.Rotator(0, YAW, 0), False)
        spawned.append(name)
print(json.dumps({'spawned': spawned, 'count': len(spawned)}))

skills.name: collision_check_demo_actors
skills.description: AABB collision check for all Demo_ prefix actors, returns collision pairs
skills.code:
import unreal, json
try:
    actors = unreal.EditorLevelLibrary.get_all_level_actors()
    demo = [a for a in actors if a.get_actor_label().startswith("Demo_")]
    info = []
    for a in demo:
        loc = a.get_actor_location()
        _, ext = a.get_actor_bounds(True)
        info.append({"label": a.get_actor_label(),
                     "x": loc.x, "y": loc.y,
                     "ex": max(abs(ext.x), 80), "ey": max(abs(ext.y), 80)})
    pairs = []
    for i in range(len(info)):
        for j in range(i+1, len(info)):
            a, b = info[i], info[j]
            if (abs(a["x"]-b["x"]) < a["ex"]+b["ex"] and
                    abs(a["y"]-b["y"]) < a["ey"]+b["ey"]):
                pairs.append({"a": a["label"], "b": b["label"]})
    print(json.dumps({"collision_count": len(pairs), "pairs": pairs,
                      "demo_count": len(demo)}))
except Exception as e:
    print(json.dumps({"collision_count": -1, "error": str(e)}))

skills.name: spawn_angled_container
skills.description: Spawn single container with custom rotation for spatial variety
skills.code:
import unreal, json, time
# CONFIG
NAME = "Demo_Cont"
MESH = "/Game/ContainerYard/Meshes/SM_Container12m.SM_Container12m"
LOC = [-4200, -7000, 0]  # [x, y, z]
YAW = 45  # rotation angle
# SPAWN
subsys = unreal.get_editor_subsystem(unreal.EditorActorSubsystem)
mesh_obj = unreal.load_asset(MESH)
sfx = hex(int(time.time()*1000) % 0xFFFF)[2:].upper()
name = f"{NAME}_{sfx}"
loc = unreal.Vector(LOC[0], LOC[1], LOC[2])
actor = subsys.spawn_actor_from_class(unreal.StaticMeshActor, loc)
if actor and mesh_obj:
    actor.set_actor_label(name)
    comp = actor.get_component_by_class(unreal.StaticMeshComponent)
    if comp: comp.set_static_mesh(mesh_obj)
    actor.set_actor_rotation(unreal.Rotator(0, YAW, 0), False)
    print(json.dumps({'spawned': name, 'location': LOC, 'yaw': YAW}))

skills.name: spawn_stacked_container
skills.description: Spawn container at elevated Z for vertical stacking
skills.code:
import unreal, json, time
# CONFIG - typical stack heights: 0, 280, 560
NAME = "Demo_ContStack"
MESH = "/Game/ContainerYard/Meshes/SM_Container12m.SM_Container12m"
BASE_LOC = [-5500, -7000]  # [x, y]
HEIGHTS = [0, 280]  # ground and 2nd layer
# SPAWN
subsys = unreal.get_editor_subsystem(unreal.EditorActorSubsystem)
mesh_obj = unreal.load_asset(MESH)
spawned = []
for i, z in enumerate(HEIGHTS):
    sfx = hex(int(time.time()*1000+i*10) % 0xFFFF)[2:].upper()
    name = f"{NAME}_{sfx}"
    loc = unreal.Vector(BASE_LOC[0], BASE_LOC[1], z)
    actor = subsys.spawn_actor_from_class(unreal.StaticMeshActor, loc)
    if actor and mesh_obj:
        actor.set_actor_label(name)
        comp = actor.get_component_by_class(unreal.StaticMeshComponent)
        if comp: comp.set_static_mesh(mesh_obj)
        spawned.append({'name': name, 'z': z})
print(json.dumps({'spawned': spawned, 'count': len(spawned)}))

skills.name: spawn_l_shaped_cluster
skills.description: Spawn L-shaped container formation with perpendicular containers
skills.code:
import unreal, json, time
# CONFIG
BASE_X = -3500; BASE_Y = -7000; Z = 0
MESH = "/Game/ContainerYard/Meshes/SM_Container12m.SM_Container12m"
CONT_LENGTH = 1200  # SM_Container12m length
# L-shape: horizontal arm (yaw=0) + vertical arm (yaw=90)
configs = [
    {"name": "Demo_LArm_Horiz", "offset": [0, 0], "yaw": 0},
    {"name": "Demo_LArm_Vert", "offset": [0, -CONT_LENGTH-300], "yaw": 90}  # gap 300
]
subsys = unreal.get_editor_subsystem(unreal.EditorActorSubsystem)
mesh_obj = unreal.load_asset(MESH)
spawned = []
for cfg in configs:
    sfx = hex(int(time.time()*1000) % 0xFFFF)[2:].upper()
    name = f"{cfg['name']}_{sfx}"
    loc = unreal.Vector(BASE_X + cfg['offset'][0], BASE_Y + cfg['offset'][1], Z)
    actor = subsys.spawn_actor_from_class(unreal.StaticMeshActor, loc)
    if actor and mesh_obj:
        actor.set_actor_label(name)
        comp = actor.get_component_by_class(unreal.StaticMeshComponent)
        if comp: comp.set_static_mesh(mesh_obj)
        actor.set_actor_rotation(unreal.Rotator(0, cfg['yaw'], 0), False)
        spawned.append(name)
    time.sleep(0.05)
print(json.dumps({'spawned': spawned, 'count': len(spawned)}))

skills.name: cleanup_demo_actors
skills.description: Delete all Demo_ actors matching a name pattern to reset scene
skills.code:
import unreal, json
PATTERN = "Demo_Cont_"  # Partial match
actors = unreal.EditorLevelLibrary.get_all_level_actors()
deleted = []
for a in actors:
    lbl = a.get_actor_label()
    if lbl.startswith("Demo_") and PATTERN in lbl:
        a.destroy_actor()
        deleted.append(lbl)
print(json.dumps({'deleted': deleted, 'count': len(deleted)}))

skills.name: get_camera_fov_bounds

skills.name: spawn_maze_l_junction
skills.description: Spawn L-shaped junction with 2 parallel walls and perpendicular blocker
skills.code:
import unreal, json, time
# CONFIG
BASE_X = -3900; BASE_Y = -6500; Z = 0
CORRIDOR_WIDTH = 1400  # distance between parallel walls
WALL_LENGTH = 1200  # container length
MESH = '/Game/ContainerYard/Meshes/SM_Container12m.SM_Container12m'
PREFIX = 'Demo_MazeL'
# SPAWN
subsys = unreal.get_editor_subsystem(unreal.EditorActorSubsystem)
mesh_obj = unreal.load_asset(MESH)
spawned = []
# Left wall (lengthwise)
name1 = f'{PREFIX}_LeftWall_{hex(int(time.time()*1000)%0xFFFF)[2:].upper()}'
actor1 = subsys.spawn_actor_from_class(unreal.StaticMeshActor, unreal.Vector(BASE_X - CORRIDOR_WIDTH/2, BASE_Y, Z))
if actor1 and mesh_obj:
    actor1.set_actor_label(name1)
    actor1.get_component_by_class(unreal.StaticMeshComponent).set_static_mesh(mesh_obj)
    actor1.set_actor_rotation(unreal.Rotator(0, 0, 0), False)
    spawned.append(name1)
# Right wall (lengthwise)
name2 = f'{PREFIX}_RightWall_{hex(int(time.time()*1000+100)%0xFFFF)[2:].upper()}'
actor2 = subsys.spawn_actor_from_class(unreal.StaticMeshActor, unreal.Vector(BASE_X + CORRIDOR_WIDTH/2, BASE_Y, Z))
if actor2 and mesh_obj:
    actor2.set_actor_label(name2)
    actor2.get_component_by_class(unreal.StaticMeshComponent).set_static_mesh(mesh_obj)
    actor2.set_actor_rotation(unreal.Rotator(0, 0, 0), False)
    spawned.append(name2)
# Perpendicular blocker (creates turn)
name3 = f'{PREFIX}_Blocker_{hex(int(time.time()*1000+200)%0xFFFF)[2:].upper()}'
actor3 = subsys.spawn_actor_from_class(unreal.StaticMeshActor, unreal.Vector(BASE_X + CORRIDOR_WIDTH/2, BASE_Y + 1000, Z))
if actor3 and mesh_obj:
    actor3.set_actor_label(name3)
    actor3.get_component_by_class(unreal.StaticMeshComponent).set_static_mesh(mesh_obj)
    actor3.set_actor_rotation(unreal.Rotator(0, 90, 0), False)
    spawned.append(name3)
print(json.dumps({'spawned': spawned, 'count': len(spawned)}))

skills.name: spawn_tjunction_maze_segment
skills.description: Spawn T-junction maze segment with parallel corridors and diagonal obstacle
skills.code:
import unreal, json, time
# CONFIG - T-junction with north extension + diagonal obstacle
BASE_X = -4050; BASE_Y = -5700  # junction center
CORRIDOR_WIDTH = 1300  # wall separation
NORTH_EXTEND = 800  # northward extension distance
MESH = '/Game/ContainerYard/Meshes/SM_Container12m.SM_Container12m'
PREFIX = 'Demo_TJunc'
# POSITIONS: 2 north walls + 1 diagonal obstacle
configs = [
    {'name': 'NorthWallWest', 'offset_x': -650, 'offset_y': NORTH_EXTEND, 'yaw': 0},
    {'name': 'NorthWallEast', 'offset_x': 650, 'offset_y': NORTH_EXTEND, 'yaw': 0},
    {'name': 'DiagObstacle', 'offset_x': 0, 'offset_y': -500, 'yaw': 45}
]
# SPAWN
subsys = unreal.get_editor_subsystem(unreal.EditorActorSubsystem)
mesh_obj = unreal.load_asset(MESH)
spawned = []
for cfg in configs:
    suffix = hex(int(time.time()*1000) % 0xFFFF)[2:].upper()
    name = f"{PREFIX}_{cfg['name']}_{suffix}"
    loc = unreal.Vector(BASE_X + cfg['offset_x'], BASE_Y + cfg['offset_y'], 0)
    actor = subsys.spawn_actor_from_class(unreal.StaticMeshActor, loc)
    if actor and mesh_obj:
        actor.set_actor_label(name)
        comp = actor.get_component_by_class(unreal.StaticMeshComponent)
        if comp: comp.set_static_mesh(mesh_obj)
        actor.set_actor_rotation(unreal.Rotator(0, cfg['yaw'], 0), False)
        spawned.append({'name': name, 'x': loc.x, 'y': loc.y, 'yaw': cfg['yaw']})
    time.sleep(0.05)
print(json.dumps({'spawned': spawned, 'count': len(spawned)}))

skills.name: spawn_maze_t_junction
skills.description: Spawn containers forming a T-junction with perpendicular and lengthwise pieces
skills.code:
import unreal, json, time
# CONFIG - T-junction: 2 crosswise walls + 1 lengthwise corridor
BASE_X = -3200; BASE_Y = -7500; Z = 0
MESH = '/Game/ContainerYard/Meshes/SM_Container12m.SM_Container12m'
PREFIX = 'Demo_TJunction'
# POSITIONS: 2 perpendicular (Y-axis walls) + 1 lengthwise (X-axis path)
POSITIONS = [
    {'x': BASE_X, 'y': BASE_Y, 'yaw': 90},  # wall 1
    {'x': BASE_X - 1300, 'y': BASE_Y, 'yaw': 90},  # wall 2 (1300 apart)
    {'x': BASE_X - 650, 'y': BASE_Y + 800, 'yaw': 0}  # corridor entry
]
subsys = unreal.get_editor_subsystem(unreal.EditorActorSubsystem)
mesh_obj = unreal.load_asset(MESH)
spawned = []
for i, pos in enumerate(POSITIONS):
    suffix = hex(int(time.time()*1000 + i*10) % 0xFFFF)[2:].upper()
    name = f'{PREFIX}_{suffix}'
    loc = unreal.Vector(pos['x'], pos['y'], Z)
    actor = subsys.spawn_actor_from_class(unreal.StaticMeshActor, loc)
    if actor and mesh_obj:
        actor.set_actor_label(name)
        comp = actor.get_component_by_class(unreal.StaticMeshComponent)
        if comp: comp.set_static_mesh(mesh_obj)
        actor.set_actor_rotation(unreal.Rotator(0, pos['yaw'], 0), False)
        spawned.append({'name': name, 'yaw': pos['yaw']})
print(json.dumps({'spawned': spawned, 'count': len(spawned)}))

skills.name: spawn_corridor_with_obstacle
skills.description: Spawn corridor wall container + perpendicular turn blocker + small prop obstacle
skills.code:
import unreal, json, time
# CONFIG
BASE_X = -5800; BASE_Y_WALL = -7500; BASE_Y_TURN = -8700; OBSTACLE_X = -4700; OBSTACLE_Y = -7000; Z = 0
CONTAINER_MESH = '/Game/ContainerYard/Meshes/SM_Container12m.SM_Container12m'
OBSTACLE_MESH = '/Game/hongkong/Geometries/KB3D_HOK_PropBarrel_A_Main.KB3D_HOK_PropBarrel_A_Main'
PREFIX = 'Demo_Corridor'
# SPAWN
subsys = unreal.get_editor_subsystem(unreal.EditorActorSubsystem)
container_obj = unreal.load_asset(CONTAINER_MESH)
obstacle_obj = unreal.load_asset(OBSTACLE_MESH)
spawned = []
# Wall (lengthwise)
name1 = f'{PREFIX}_Wall_{hex(int(time.time()*1000)%0xFFFF)[2:].upper()}'
actor1 = subsys.spawn_actor_from_class(unreal.StaticMeshActor, unreal.Vector(BASE_X, BASE_Y_WALL, Z))
if actor1 and container_obj:
    actor1.set_actor_label(name1)
    actor1.get_component_by_class(unreal.StaticMeshComponent).set_static_mesh(container_obj)
    actor1.set_actor_rotation(unreal.Rotator(0, 0, 0), False)
    spawned.append(name1)
# Turn blocker (perpendicular)
name2 = f'{PREFIX}_Turn_{hex(int(time.time()*1000+50)%0xFFFF)[2:].upper()}'
actor2 = subsys.spawn_actor_from_class(unreal.StaticMeshActor, unreal.Vector(BASE_X, BASE_Y_TURN, Z))
if actor2 and container_obj:
    actor2.set_actor_label(name2)
    actor2.get_component_by_class(unreal.StaticMeshComponent).set_static_mesh(container_obj)
    actor2.set_actor_rotation(unreal.Rotator(0, 90, 0), False)
    spawned.append(name2)
# Obstacle (diagonal)
name3 = f'{PREFIX}_Obstacle_{hex(int(time.time()*1000+100)%0xFFFF)[2:].upper()}'
actor3 = subsys.spawn_actor_from_class(unreal.StaticMeshActor, unreal.Vector(OBSTACLE_X, OBSTACLE_Y, Z))
if actor3 and obstacle_obj:
    actor3.set_actor_label(name3)
    actor3.get_component_by_class(unreal.StaticMeshComponent).set_static_mesh(obstacle_obj)
    actor3.set_actor_rotation(unreal.Rotator(0, 45, 0), False)
    spawned.append(name3)
print(json.dumps({'spawned': spawned, 'count': len(spawned)}))

skills.name: spawn_diagonal_corridor_trio
skills.description: Spawn three containers at 30°, 45°, and 60° angles to create tight zig-zag corridor
skills.code:
import unreal, json, time
# CONFIG - diagonal corridor pattern
BASE_X = -3800; BASE_Y = -5200; Z = 0
MESH = '/Game/ContainerYard/Meshes/SM_Container12m.SM_Container12m'
PREFIX = 'Demo_DiagCorridor'
# Three angles with offsets
configs = [
    {'offset': [0, 0], 'yaw': 30, 'role': 'gentle'},
    {'offset': [800, -200], 'yaw': 60, 'role': 'sharp'},
    {'offset': [400, -1000], 'yaw': 45, 'role': 'barrier'}
]
# SPAWN
subsys = unreal.get_editor_subsystem(unreal.EditorActorSubsystem)
mesh_obj = unreal.load_asset(MESH)
spawned = []
for i, cfg in enumerate(configs):
    sfx = hex(int(time.time()*1000 + i*100) % 0xFFFF)[2:].upper()
    name = f'{PREFIX}_{cfg["role"]}_{sfx}'
    loc = unreal.Vector(BASE_X + cfg['offset'][0], BASE_Y + cfg['offset'][1], Z)
    actor = subsys.spawn_actor_from_class(unreal.StaticMeshActor, loc)
    if actor and mesh_obj:
        actor.set_actor_label(name)
        comp = actor.get_component_by_class(unreal.StaticMeshComponent)
        if comp: comp.set_static_mesh(mesh_obj)
        actor.set_actor_rotation(unreal.Rotator(0, cfg['yaw'], 0), False)
        spawned.append({'name': name, 'angle': cfg['yaw']})
print(json.dumps({'spawned': spawned, 'count': len(spawned)}))
